meta.title: תוכנית שנתית · אנגלית · תנופה · כיתה ט'
meta.subject: אנגלית
meta.basedOn: Table of Specifications לתנופה אנגלית ט' (ראמ"ה תשפ"ו) · English Curriculum 2020 · Inspectorate Bulletin 2025-2026 · CEFR Companion Volume 2020
meta.pedagogicalApproach: CLT + TBLT + Lexical Approach · Thematic Units עם integrated 4 skills

units.name: Bridge — סגירת חסרים
units.description: אבחון פתיחה + סגירת 5 החסרים הקריטיים: phonemic awareness, sight words/chunks, reading strategies, sentence-level writing, cohesive devices. בלי זה — אי אפשר להתקדם.

units.name: Unit 1 · My World
units.description: Family · Friends · Routines. Present Simple vs. Continuous. כתיבת diary entry/blog/message.

units.name: Unit 2 · School and Learning
units.description: Academic chunks · Imperatives · Modals (can/should). קריאת timetable + notice + instructions.

units.name: Unit 3 · Food, Health, Well-being
units.description: Countable/uncountable · Quantifiers · Health vocab. Recipe + Advertisement + Brochure.

units.name: Unit 4 · Stories and People
units.description: Past Simple + Past Progressive. Biography + Story + Comic strip. חיבור 5 הסוגות העיקריות לתנופה.

units.name: Unit 7 · Tnufa Strategic Review (PRE-EXAM)
units.description: סימולציות מלאות · אסטרטגיות 4 חלקי הבחינה · question-type recognition · time management. **לפני** מבחן 9.2.2027.

units.name: Unit 5 · Travel and the World (POST-EXAM)
units.description: Comparatives/superlatives · Going-to future. Flyer + Brochure + Review + Timetable. מחזירים מומנטום.

units.name: Unit 6 · Media and Technology
units.description: Present Perfect (intro). Article + Forum + Blog. אוצר מילים טכנולוגי + opinion language.

units.name: Unit 8 · Beyond the Test — Real-World English
units.description: פרויקט אישי · קריאת מקור אמיתי · CEFR self-assessment · הכנה רכה לכיתה י'. **חיוני** — בלי זה התלמיד נכנס לי' בלי להתקדם רמה.

topics: אבחון רמת CEFR — Cambridge Placement test (1ש)
Class routines + Lexical Notebook setup + יעדי השנה (2ש)
Phonics revision + sight words audit (1ש)
50 sight words הנפוצים ביותר (Dolch list adapted) (1ש)
Word attack skills: prefixes (un-, re-, pre-), suffixes (-ing, -ed, -ly), cognates (2ש)
Phonics — vowel patterns + consonant blends (1ש)
Skimming — איתור רעיון מרכזי תוך 30 שניות (1ש)
Scanning — חיפוש מידע ספציפי בטקסט (1ש)
Prediction — מה הטקסט יספר לפי כותרת/תמונה (1ש)
25 chunks ראשונים: "because of", "in order to", "according to"... (2ש)
תרגול chunks בהקשר — חיבור משפט עם chunk (1ש)
Subject-Verb agreement + תקינות מבנה משפט (1ש)
Simple sentence: S+V+O / S+V+C. תרגול כתיבה (2ש)
Connecting 2 sentences: and / but / because (1ש)
Cohesive devices: first/then/finally/also (1ש)
25 chunks חלק 2 + תרגול הקראה (2ש)
Bridge Assessment + שיקוף אישי בLexical Notebook (1ש)
Family chunks: "live with", "spend time with", "get along with" (1ש)
Present Simple revision בהקשר משפחה (2ש)
Speaking pairs — describe your family in 5 sentences (1ש)
Daily routine chunks: wake up, brush teeth, have breakfast, get dressed... (1ש)
Present Simple + frequency adverbs (always, usually, often, sometimes, never) + position rules (2ש)
Time markers: in the morning, at 7, on weekdays (1ש)
Friend vocab + chunks: best friend, classmate, hang out, get along (1ש)
I like/love/hate + V-ing. דעות פשוטות (2ש)
Listening — 2 קטעי שמע: shadowing וpaired retelling (1ש)
Diary entry structure (date, opening, body, closing) (1ש)
כתיבה — diary entry של 40-50 מילים (rubric: relevance/vocab/accuracy/mechanics/length) (2ש)
Unit 1 Assessment — reading + writing + listening (1ש)
School subjects + objects (notebook, pencil case, locker...) + chunks (1ש)
Days of week + ordinal numbers + reading a school timetable (2ש)
Notice + announcement comprehension (1ש)
Imperatives: "open your book", "raise your hand", "speak up" (1ש)
Modals: can (ability/permission), should (advice), must (obligation) (2ש)
Reading — instructions text type (recipe-style) (1ש)
Unit 2 Assessment (1ש)
Unit 3 intro — food vocab + chunks (2ש)
Countable vs. uncountable — מה הכלל? (1ש)
Food types + meal chunks: "have breakfast", "order pizza" (1ש)
Quantifiers: some/any/much/many/a lot of (2ש)
Recipe reading — ingredients + instructions (1ש)
Health vocab: sick, tired, healthy, exhausted (1ש)
Should/shouldn't for advice (2ש)
Advertisement text type — health/fitness ad (1ש)
Brochure text type — מבנה ופונקציה (1ש)
כתיבה — health brochure (40-50 מילים, בonus structure) (2ש)
Unit 3 Assessment (1ש)
Past Simple intro — regular verbs + הגייה של -ed (1ש)
Top 30 irregular verbs (be/have/go/come/say/get/make...) (2ש)
Past time markers: yesterday, last week, in 2020, when I was 7 (1ש)
Biography text type — מבנה, מסע חיים, milestones (1ש)
Read biography — young athlete/scientist/musician (2ש)
Inference questions on the biography (Tnufa-style) (1ש)
Story sequence markers: first/then/after that/finally (1ש)
Past Progressive (was/were + -ing) + שילוב עם Past Simple (2ש)
Short story comprehension — comic strip / story (1ש)
Unit 4 Assessment (1ש)
Tnufa structure overview — Vocabulary 20%, Reading 75%, Writing 5% (1ש)
Tnufa sample 1 — full mock + analysis (2ש)
Tnufa sample 2 — full timed mock (2ש)
Mock analysis — chunk identification + question-type review (1ש)
Tnufa sample 3 — focused on weakest question types (1ש)
Final tips + question-type strategies + question-stem chunks (1ש)
רפלקציה איכותית על המבחן (לא ציונים — חוויה) (1ש)
Travel vocab + places + transport (2ש)
Travel chunks: "take a flight", "book a hotel", "check in" (1ש)
Comparative adjectives — short (bigger) + long (more interesting) (1ש)
Superlatives — the biggest, the most interesting (2ש)
Review text — recommend a place / restaurant (1ש)
Going-to future — plans + predictions (1ש)
Timetables — Present Simple for schedules ("the train leaves at 6") (2ש)
Travel itinerary reading + writing (1ש)
Speaking — present a place you'd want to visit (3-5 min) (2ש)
Unit 5 Assessment (1ש)
Review of travel + comparatives (1ש)
Tech vocab + chunks: "go online", "download an app", "post a story" (1ש)
Present Perfect intro (have/has + V-ed) — life experiences (2ש)
Article reading — tech topic (e.g. AI, social media) (1ש)
Opinion chunks: "I think", "In my opinion", "I believe that" (1ש)
Forum + blog text types — תכונות שלהם (1ש)
כתיבה — opinion paragraph (40-50 מילים) (1ש)
תיאום ציפיות לפרויקט אישי — בחירת נושא חופשי (1ש)
Resource research — איך לחפש באנגלית באמת (2ש)
Project planning sheet (1ש)
Project development time + peer feedback session (2ש)
Read a real (simplified) news article — BBC News for Learners (1ש)
Listening — TED-Ed mini-talk with English subtitles (1ש)
Project presentations — קבוצות של 3, כל תלמיד 3 דק' (2ש)
Peer feedback rubric + class reflection (1ש)
Best-of showcase + parent invitation (אופציונלי) (1ש)
CEFR self-assessment — where am I now? (CEFR Companion checklist) (1ש)
Year reflection — what I learned, what I want to learn next (2ש)
Preview of grade י' + reading list לקיץ (1ש)

hoursDistribution.totalDoesNotEqualSumWarning: סך השעות לפי skill (128) שונה מהסכום לפי unit כי הוראה אינטגרטיבית — אותה שעה משרתת מספר skills במקביל.
